DISCOVERY 302, DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO PARKS ALLIANCE'S MOTION TO COMPEL PLAINTIFF TO RESPOND TO WRITTEN DISCOVERY; REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS. MOTION TO COMPEL GRANTED. NO TIMELY OPPOSITION FILED. ON OR BEFORE JULY 3, 2019, PLAINTIFF IS ORDERED TO PROVIDE COMPLETE ANSWERS TO THE FORM INTERROGATORIES AND SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES, AND TO SERVE RESPONSES TO THE REQUESTS FOR PRODUCTION. ALL OBJECTIONS ARE WAIVED. CCP 2030.290 (INTERROGATORIES), 2031.300 (REQUESTS FOR PRODUCTION). SANCTIONS ARE GRANTED IN THE AMOUNT OF $600 ($540 IN FEES FOR 3 HOURS AT $180/HOUR + $60 IN FILING FEE) PAYABLE BY JULY 3, 2019. ORDER IS SIGNED. (SEE SCANNED ORDER FOR DETAILS) JUDGE PRO TEM: SCOTT BORROWMAN, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, NOT REPORTED. =(302/JPT)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Plaintiff To Respond To Written Discovery; Request For Sanctions
Off Calendar Jun-18-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Anastasia McMurry, Esq. 415-398-0200 of Vogl Meredith Burke for Defendant SAN FRANCISCO PARKS ALLIANCE.
No other Appearance.

RULING - The matter is Uncontested. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO PARKS ALLIANCE's Motion To Compel Plaintiff To Respond To Written Discovery; Request For Sanctions.

Motion to compel GRANTED. No timely opposition filed.

On or before July 3, 2019, Plaintiff is ordered to provide complete answers to the Form Interrogatories and Special Interrogatories, and to serve responses to the Requests for Production. All objections are waived. CCP 2030.290 (interrogatories), 2031.300 (requests for production). Sanctions are GRANTED in the amount of $600 ($540 in fees for 3 hours at $180/hour + $60 in filing fee) payable by July 3, 2019.

Order is signed. (see scanned order for details)

Judge Pro Tem: Scott Borrowman, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not reported. =(302/JPT)
